2306500.name: Street Basket Challenge Demo
2306500.description:
Street Basket Challenge is a 2-on-2 SD-style basketball game featuring charismatic characters and a gameplay system inspired by classic arcade beat ’em ups.

As usual for the series, traditional sports rules don’t apply. Players can steal the ball from opponents by any means necessary.

Each team has a basket on three different backboards—high, medium, and low. Once a basket receives enough points, it breaks off the backboard. You can pick it up and repair it… or take it and attach it to your opponent’s board.

Stages include unique features such as traps and boost zones, and each character comes equipped with distinct abilities, special techniques, and powerful super shots.

The full game also includes a full tournament mode where players can level up, unlock improvements, and customize their playstyle. With a wide variety of stages, items, teams, characters, and special shots, Street Basket Challenge offers a deep and chaotic arcade-style experience with plenty of replay value.
